evals.prompt: Log into my MUD character and look around — tell me what room you're in and what's nearby.
evals.expected_output: Connects to localhost:4000, logs in as dummy/helloworld, sends 'look', and reports the room name/description/exits back to the user in plain language.

evals.prompt: Can you find the bakery and list the menu?
evals.expected_output: Logs in (or reconnects), navigates to the bakery room if not already there, uses the in-game 'list' command (or equivalent) to show the shop's wares, and reports the menu/items back to the user.

evals.prompt: Check in on my MUD character's stats and inventory, and update your notes on where things stand.
evals.expected_output: Logs in, runs score/inventory/equipment (or equivalents), reports current stats to the user, and updates data/character.md with the fresh info.
